de.title: Rechnung (Italien, FatturaPA)
de.description: Italienische Rechnung im Xentral-Original-Stil mit Partita IVA, Codice Fiscale, Codice Destinatario/PEC und optionalem Bollo-Hinweis.

en.title: Invoice (Italy, FatturaPA)
en.description: Italian invoice in the Xentral-Original clean style (black on white, no colour fills) with the fiscal fields FatturaPA / Fattura Elettronica requires — Codice Fiscale, Partita IVA, Codice Destinatario (or PEC) and an optional Bollo (stamp duty) note. DIN-5008 layout, fiscal IDs in the info block, seller fiscal footer. Full FatturaPA compliance still needs the structured XML (analog to ZUGFeRD) — left for a follow-up. Renders from the standard V3 invoices payload.

constraints: html lang attribute MUST be set on <html>
Partita IVA MUST be displayed for both buyer and seller
Codice Destinatario or PEC MUST be visible for B2B/B2G
amounts MUST use tabular-nums and right-align

it.bollo_note: Imposta di bollo assolta in modo virtuale ai sensi del DM 28/12/2018.
